flow.normalized_question: What is the average grade of my enrollments?
flow.sql: SELECT AVG(grade) FROM my_enrollments WHERE grade IS NOT NULL
flow.answer: The average grade of your enrollments is 81.07.

update.schema_text:
- course_offerings(id, course_id, teacher_id, semester_id)
- courses(id, code, title)
- me(id, name, email)
- my_enrollments(id, student_id, offering_id, grade)
- semesters(id, term, year)
- teachers(id, name, email)

update.normalized_question: What is the average grade of my enrollments?

update.sql: SELECT AVG(grade) FROM my_enrollments WHERE grade IS NOT NULL

update.answer: The average grade of your enrollments is 81.07.
